# prompt-editor

Conversation-scoped prompt editor. Wraps the generic `text-editor` primitive
and adds a `FloatingAction` slot for conversation-specific toolbar
contributions (e.g. prompt template chips).

Only used by `prompt-input` (the conversation prompt bar). All other text
editing surfaces use `TextEditor` directly.

## Plugin reference

- Description: Conversation-scoped prompt editor wrapper adding a FloatingAction slot.
- Exports (web):
  - Types: `PromptEditorActionProps`
  - Values: `PromptEditor`, `PromptEditorSlots`

## Plugin reference

- Description: Conversation-scoped prompt editor. Wraps the generic text-editor primitive and adds a FloatingAction slot for conversation-specific toolbar contributions (e.g. prompt templates).
- Web:
  - Slots: `PromptEditorSlots.FloatingAction`
  - Exports: Types: `PromptEditorActionProps`; Values: `PromptEditor`, `PromptEditorSlots`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Slot contributors: `exit-menu`, `prompt-templates`, `push-and-exit`, `voice-input`
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`voice-input`** — Voice dictation for the prompt editor via the Web Speech API.
